name: Chewy Chocolate-Orange Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Raisin puree is the base for the dough of this rich-tasting, chewy bar.
The combination of orange and chocolate makes a classic favorite.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
3. Stir in oats and brown sugar.
4. Beat egg whites lightly in another bowl.
5. Stir in raisin puree.
6. Mix in raisin puree into the flour mixture along with chocolate, walnuts, and orange zest until just blended.
7. Spoon batter into a 9-inch-square baking pan sprayed with non-stick vegetable spray.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 25 to 30 minutes.
9. Cool completely.
10. Cut into 24 bars.
